options.name: -name
options.description: Specify unique window name for the opening schematic view.

options.name: -objects
options.description: <inst|net|instTerm|term|hInst>+ Specify the objects which are added in the schematic view. ((inst|net|instTerm|term|hInst)+, optional)

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specify selected objects which are added in the schematic view.

options.name: -type
options.description: Specify the opened type of schematic.
